87e9a24155537c9a.original_title: Appeals court reinstates $656M judgment against the PLO and Palestinian Authority
87e9a24155537c9a.original_content_preview: A federal appeals court on Monday reinstated a $656 million judgment against the Palestine Liberation Organization and Palestinian Authority for their role in terrorist attacks in Israel more than two decades ago. The ruling by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit revives a lawsuit brought by American victims of six attacks between 2001 and 2004 that killed 33 people and wounded more than 450.

2d033f39af74ed4e.original_title: Trump widens threat to all of Iran's power plants and bridges as his deadline for a deal approaches
2d033f39af74ed4e.original_content_preview: President Donald Trump on Monday widened his threats against Iran to include all of the country's power plants and bridges, as his self-imposed deadline for a nuclear deal approached. In a post on Truth Social, Trump said that if Iran does not agree to a deal by his deadline, "every power plant and bridge in Iran will be destroyed."
